goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'unusual' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'north'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'chinese' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '19:45' on 'friday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'swimmingpool' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve unusual food
The restaurant should be in the north
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 19:45 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of swimmingpool and should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get postcode and phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
